character.name: Style: 16-bit horror pixel art
character.prompt:
Style: 16-bit horror pixel art game sprite, hard pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, limited
muted palette with clashing accents, full-body, front-facing, centered on flat dark grey
background.
A mysterious hooded oracle of chaos and permutation — an ominous fortune-teller, NOT a
clown. Its long ragged robe is covered in dozens of scattered number-tiles (7,2,9,1,4,3)
in wildly mismatched sizes and rotations, clearly caught mid-shuffle, some tiles peeling
off and floating around its body in a swirling cloud. The robe itself is asymmetric and
wrong: one sleeve far longer than the other, the hem torn at random uneven lengths, patches
of clashing color stitched in no pattern. It holds up a shallow bowl containing a churning,
never-settling swirl of glowing dice and tiles mid-roll. Its face is hidden in deep hood
shadow except one cold glowing eye and a faint knowing smile. Around its feet, faint grey
Null-Rot static creeps in subtly. Unsettling, chaotic, and prophetic — a being made of
randomness that has seen something it shouldn't have.
